---
name: Bug Report
about: Something isn't working correctly
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Open keeper.raw
2. Click '...'
3. Navigate to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages (copy-paste the text, don't just screenshot).

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- **OS**: [e.g., Windows 11, macOS 14.2, Ubuntu 24.04]
- **keeper.raw version**: [e.g., v0.1.0]
- **Camera/RAW format**: [e.g., Canon R5 / .CR3]
- **Number of images in folder**: [e.g., 500]
- **RAM**: [e.g., 16 GB]

## Additional Context

Any other info that might help — crash logs, console output, etc.
